name: altnautica-command
description: Altnautica Command — Open-source Ground Control Station for autonomous drones

scripts.desktop:dev: npm run build && npm run electron:compile && electron .
scripts.desktop:demo: npm run build && npm run electron:compile && electron . --demo
scripts.desktop:build: npm run build && npm run electron:compile && electron-builder
scripts.desktop:build:mac: npm run build && npm run electron:compile && electron-builder --mac
scripts.desktop:build:win: npm run build && npm run electron:compile && electron-builder --win
scripts.desktop:build:linux: npm run build && npm run electron:compile && electron-builder --linux
